name: Wall relief band
description: A horizontal decorative band on the four interior walls, at mid-height. Style-varied blocks (cobblestone_wall, spruce_log, purpur_pillar, chiseled_stone_bricks, chiseled_sandstone, quartz_pillar, …). Universal: applies to ANY room of ANY building tall enough.
placement_rules: Decoration placed at y = y0 + h/2 on the inner side of the four perimeter walls.
Skipped if the room is shorter than 4 in any dimension.
python_skill_signature: pipeline.skills.wall_relief.build(aabb: AABB, materials: Materials, style: str, **kwargs) -> list[Op]
